commit.subject: LU-8805 test: debug patch
commit.message:
LU-8805 test: debug patch

debug patch to collect more logs.

Test-Parameters: alwaysuploadlogs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 \
mdsdistro=el7 clientcount=4 osscount=2 mdscount=2 \
austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 \
testlist=recovery-mds-scale,recovery-mds-scale,recovery-mds-scale

Change-Id: Ie2b1e6a21f461ca669861c04968a48ad403c0a51
Signed-off-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao.zhang@intel.com>
